afterSnapshot.name: BEST_WINDOW_SIZE_HOURS
afterSnapshot.description: Number of consecutive forecast hours that make up a sailing window.

context.userMessage: Approved — go ahead and build it. Run the tests and type checks to verify nothing is broken, and show me what changed.

rationale: Avoid a magic number and make the calmest-window length tunable.
implementation: Stored as app config so computeBestWindow and getBestWindow read it via config.get.
